tag.name: why on earth is this just a bonus track

wiki.summary: “20 Min” is the last track of Luv Is Rage 2 (Deluxe). Here Uzi describes the first time they met their ex-girlfriend, Brittany Byrd. This song also talks about other women that have approached Uzi in his music career. “20 Min” was a much awaited song by fans once Lil Uzi previewed a 30 second snippet of it. Fans could hear the last line of the pre-chorus all the way to the line “But I treat it like my city show.” Read more on Last.fm.
